name: Trans-Global Capital Management, Inc.
summary: Trans-Global Capital Management, Inc., an investment company, specializes in the real estate development. It offers design, site preparation, cost estimates, construction, and repair services. The company focuses on investment opportunities in the real estate sector, including office, hotel, and retail. It also offers insurance products, consulting, and related services to its customers. The company was formerly known as Clear Cut Film & Technologies Studios, Inc. and changed its name to Trans-Global Capital Management, Inc. in February 2007. Trans-Global Capital Management, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois.
